title: Warm Earthy Spanish Leek Paella Valenciana
description: A traditional Spanish dish featuring leeks and other earthy ingredients, this paella is dense and comforting, perfect for a cold evening, and is also anti-inflammatory friendly due to its ingredients.

ingredients.name: leeks
ingredients.notes: white and light green parts only

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced leeks and cook until they are softened and lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the smoked paprika and saffron threads and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Arborio rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, until the rice is coated in the oil and spices.
Add the vegetable broth, artichoke hearts, cherry tomatoes, salt, and black pepper, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, until the rice is cooked and the liquid is absorbed.
Remove the pan from the heat and let it rest, covered, for 5 minutes.
Serve the paella hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or thyme, if desired.
